entries.name: fedora-cloud-base-43-x86_64
entries.description: Fedora Cloud Base 43 Generic qcow2. Boots to a serial login prompt on ttyS0; this is a base cloud image with no preinstalled kdive SSH key and no kdive-ready service, so target.run_tests over SSH needs cloud-init/key wiring (see the builder / #103). Provided to exercise fetch/verify and boot-to-marker.
